TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_iga-namicakay_tuway_kami_ku_Zoo,2011, title = iga-namicakay_tuway_kami_ku_Zoo,2011, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/iga-namicakay_tuway_kami_ku_Zoo,2011} }

S.FORM: == iga-namicakay tuway kami ku Zoo,2011 == 我們買了動物園 , 2011 siwkay ni iga "namicakay tuway kami ku Zoo"(Amilika a kamu:We Bought a Zoo)u 2011 a mihcan katawaay a iga nu Amilika. ci Kamaylung Kelu ku mitelungay. mupalaw ci Mayte Taymeng atu ci Sekaley Ciyahansen. " . u kungku nu iga pazengen tu ku balucu'sananay, 釋懷就是 pizawis tu cacay a tademaw, 接受了一個人 u zuma a sasakawawen malalid i uzip isu katukuh haynisadikud sapuelac nu Amilika: (Amilika a kamu)Moving on is accepting the fact that some people will stay in your life in a way you didn't know was possible. Pan J.M. u wama nu taw, inayi' ku acawana. 班傑明•密是一位單親父親. namapatay ku acawana niza sanay, 在妻子患病過世後 cacay ciniza midiput tu wawama atu wawana niza. sakadahi atu i lipahakay a kakitizaan balaki tu wawa niza , namahiza miliyas kya malalumay a kakitizaan, , Pan J.M. milimad tu luma'niza tayza i niyazu' mapeciay a zoo . u lalumaan niza atu musakakawaway maydih miliyaw patizeng kya zoo, uyzasa, izaw yadah ku kawaw atu sasadakayan, , yamalyilu minanam midiput tu aadupan, 包括學習照料動物, misanga' tu sakapahay a langat, 建造符合規定的柵欄, nipacabay kya mikingcaay, 應付難纏的檢查員, namahiza masasiket tu lalumaay atu cabay, .
S.PHON: == iga-namiʦakaj tuwaj kami ku zoo,**** == ******* , **** siwkaj ni iga "namiʦakaj tuwaj kami ku zoo"(amir~ɾika a kamu:wə bougħt a zoo)u **** a miħʦan katawaaj a iga nu amir~ɾika. ʦi kamajr~ɾuŋ kər~ɾu ku mitər~ɾuŋaj. mupar~ɾaw ʦi majtə tajməŋ atu ʦi səkar~ɾə ʦijaħansən. " . u kuŋku nu iga pazəŋən tu ku bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡsananaj, **** pizawis tu ʦaʦaj a tadəmaw, ****** u zuma a sasakawawən mar~ɾar~ɾid i uzip isu katukuħ ħajnisadikud sapuər~ɾaʦ nu amir~ɾika: (amir~ɾika a kamu)mo*iŋ on is aʦʦəptiŋ tħə faʦt tħat somə pəopr~ɾə wir~ɾr~ɾ staj in jour r~ɾifə in a waj jou didnʔ~ʡt know was possibr~ɾə. pan *.m. u wama nu taw, inajiʔ~ʡ ku aʦawana. ************. namapataj ku aʦawana niza sanaj, ******** ʦaʦaj ʦiniza midiput tu wawama atu wawana niza. sakadaħi atu i r~ɾipaħakaj a kakitizaan bar~ɾaki tu wawa niza , namaħiza mir~ɾijas kja mar~ɾar~ɾumaj a kakitizaan, , pan *.m. mir~ɾimad tu r~ɾumaʔ~ʡniza tajza i nijazuʔ~ʡ mapəʦiaj a zoo . u r~ɾar~ɾumaan niza atu musakakawawaj majdiħ mir~ɾijaw patizəŋ kja zoo, ujzasa, izaw jadaħ ku kawaw atu sasadakajan, , jamar~ɾjir~ɾu minanam midiput tu aadupan, ********, misaŋaʔ~ʡ tu sakapaħaj a r~ɾaŋat, *********, nipaʦabaj kja mikiŋʦaaj, ********, namaħiza masasikət tu r~ɾar~ɾumaaj atu ʦabaj, .
S.FORM: == iga-namicakay tuway kami ku Zoo,2011 == 我們買了動物園 , 2011 siwkay ni iga "namicakay tuway kami ku Zoo"(Amilika a kamu:We Bought a Zoo)u 2011 a mihcan katawaay a iga nu Amilika. ci Kamaylung Kelu ku mitelungay. mupalaw ci Mayte Taymeng atu ci Sekaley Ciyahansen. " . u kungku nu iga pazengen tu ku balucu'sananay, 釋懷就是 pizawis tu cacay a tademaw, 接受了一個人 u zuma a sasakawawen malalid i uzip isu katukuh haynisadikud sapuelac nu Amilika: (Amilika a kamu)Moving on is accepting the fact that some people will stay in your life in a way you didn't know was possible. Pan J.M. u wama nu taw, inayi' ku acawana. 班傑明•密是一位單親父親. namapatay ku acawana niza sanay, 在妻子患病過世後 cacay ciniza midiput tu wawama atu wawana niza. sakadahi atu i lipahakay a kakitizaan balaki tu wawa niza , namahiza miliyas kya malalumay a kakitizaan, , Pan J.M. milimad tu luma'niza tayza i niyazu' mapeciay a zoo . u lalumaan niza atu musakakawaway maydih miliyaw patizeng kya zoo, uyzasa, izaw yadah ku kawaw atu sasadakayan, , yamalyilu minanam midiput tu aadupan, 包括學習照料動物, misanga' tu sakapahay a langat, 建造符合規定的柵欄, nipacabay kya mikingcaay, 應付難纏的檢查員, namahiza masasiket tu lalumaay atu cabay, .
S.PHON: == iga-namiʦakaj tuwaj kami ku zoo,**** == ******* , **** siwkaj ni iga "namiʦakaj tuwaj kami ku zoo"(amir~ɾika a kamu:wə bougħt a zoo)u **** a miħʦan katawaaj a iga nu amir~ɾika. ʦi kamajr~ɾuŋ kər~ɾu ku mitər~ɾuŋaj. mupar~ɾaw ʦi majtə tajməŋ atu ʦi səkar~ɾə ʦijaħansən. " . u kuŋku nu iga pazəŋən tu ku bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡsananaj, **** pizawis tu ʦaʦaj a tadəmaw, ****** u zuma a sasakawawən mar~ɾar~ɾid i uzip isu katukuħ ħajnisadikud sapuər~ɾaʦ nu amir~ɾika: (amir~ɾika a kamu)mo*iŋ on is aʦʦəptiŋ tħə faʦt tħat somə pəopr~ɾə wir~ɾr~ɾ staj in jour r~ɾifə in a waj jou didnʔ~ʡt know was possibr~ɾə. pan *.m. u wama nu taw, inajiʔ~ʡ ku aʦawana. ************. namapataj ku aʦawana niza sanaj, ******** ʦaʦaj ʦiniza midiput tu wawama atu wawana niza. sakadaħi atu i r~ɾipaħakaj a kakitizaan bar~ɾaki tu wawa niza , namaħiza mir~ɾijas kja mar~ɾar~ɾumaj a kakitizaan, , pan *.m. mir~ɾimad tu r~ɾumaʔ~ʡniza tajza i nijazuʔ~ʡ mapəʦiaj a zoo . u r~ɾar~ɾumaan niza atu musakakawawaj majdiħ mir~ɾijaw patizəŋ kja zoo, ujzasa, izaw jadaħ ku kawaw atu sasadakajan, , jamar~ɾjir~ɾu minanam midiput tu aadupan, ********, misaŋaʔ~ʡ tu sakapaħaj a r~ɾaŋat, *********, nipaʦabaj kja mikiŋʦaaj, ********, namaħiza masasikət tu r~ɾar~ɾumaaj atu ʦabaj, .
